import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaFacebook, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaLinkedin, FaGithub, FaEnvelope, FaPhone, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaHeart, FaGraduationCap, FaBookOpen, FaChartLine, FaUserGraduate } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const footerStyle = { background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%)', color: 'white', padding: '4rem 2rem 2rem', marginTop: 'auto', borderTop: '4px solid linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', fontFamily: "'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif", }; const containerStyle = { maxWidth: '1280px', margin: '0 auto', }; const gridStyle = { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(1, 1fr)', gap: '3rem', '@media (min-width: 768px)': { gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', }, '@media (min-width: 1024px)': { gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)', }, }; const sectionTitleStyle = { fontSize: '1.25rem', fontWeight: '700', marginBottom: '1.5rem', color: '#f8fafc', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', paddingBottom: '0.75rem', borderBottom: '2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', }; const linkItemStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', color: '#cbd5e1', textDecoration: 'none', padding: '0.5rem 0', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', fontSize: '0.95rem', fontWeight: '400', '&:hover': { color: '#ffffff', transform: 'translateX(8px)', paddingLeft: '8px', }, }; const contactItemStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: '1rem', marginBottom: '1.25rem', color: '#cbd5e1', fontSize: '0.95rem', lineHeight: '1.5', }; const iconWrapperStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', width: '36px', height: '36px', borderRadius: '50%', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', flexShrink: 0, }; const logoStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', fontSize: '1.75rem', fontWeight: '800', marginBottom: '1.5rem', color: 'white', textDecoration: 'none', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text', WebkitTextFillColor: 'transparent', backgroundClip: 'text', }; const descriptionStyle = { color: '#94a3b8', lineHeight: '1.7', marginBottom: '2rem', fontSize: '0.95rem', }; const socialLinksStyle = { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '2rem', 'a': { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', width: '44px', height: '44px', borderRadius: '12px', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', color: '#cbd5e1', fontSize: '1.2rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', color: 'white', transform: 'translateY(-4px)', boxShadow: '0 8px 25px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.4)', }, }, }; const newsletterStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '1.5rem', borderRadius: '16px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '1.5rem', }; const inputStyle = { width: '100%', padding: '0.875rem 1rem', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', borderRadius: '10px', color: 'white', fontSize: '0.95rem', marginBottom: '1rem', outline: 'none', transition: 'all 0.3s', '&:focus': { borderColor: '#4f46e5', boxShadow: '0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2)', }, '&::placeholder': { color: '#94a3b8', }, }; const buttonStyle = { width: '100%', padding: '0.875rem', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', color: 'white', border: 'none', borderRadius: '10px', fontSize: '1rem', fontWeight: '600', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'all 0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '0.5rem', '&:hover': { background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4338ca, #6d28d9)', transform: 'translateY(-2px)', boxShadow: '0 6px 20px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.4)', }, }; const statsGridStyle = { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem', }; const statCardStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '1rem', borderRadius: '12px', textAlign: 'center', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', }; const statNumberStyle = { fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: '700', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text', WebkitTextFillColor: 'transparent', marginBottom: '0.25rem', }; const statLabelStyle = { fontSize: '0.8rem', color: '#94a3b8', fontWeight: '500', }; const copyrightStyle = { borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '4rem', paddingTop: '2rem', textAlign: 'center', color: '#94a3b8', fontSize: '0.9rem', }; const badgeStyle = { background: 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2)', color: '#818cf8', padding: '0.25rem 0.75rem', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: '600', marginLeft: '0.5rem', }; return (
